title: Daraar
desc: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy businessman, falls for Priya Bhatia, a charming real estate agent. But when he proposes, his world shatters-Priya is already married.

title: Mausam (1975)
desc: Amarnath leaves Chanda, promising to return and marry her. Years later, he finds her daughter in trouble and decides to take responsibility and give her a better life.

title: English Vinglish
desc: Shashi, a housewife and caterer, is mocked for not knowing English. Her journey to learn the language helps her rediscover herself and prove her worth as a mother and wife.

title: Toilet: Ek Prem Katha
desc: Keshav marries Jaya and adores her, but their happiness falters when she protests the lack of a toilet at home. As tensions rise, he struggles to appease her with temporary fixes.

title: Gunjan Saxena: The Kargil Girl
desc: Ambitious Gunjan Saxena dreams of flying. Facing resistance, she becomes a pilot and proves her courage by serving the nation bravely during the Kargil War. A story of determination.

title: Runway 34
desc: Two pilots made a risky landing in Thiruvananthapuram due to bad weather. Trouble begins when aviation authorities investigate the incident, uncovering deeper issues.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
desc: Kabir, Imran, and Arjun set off on a vacation in Spain before Kabir's wedding, where the journey helps them mend bonds, heal old wounds, embrace life, and face their deepest fears.

title: Yamla Pagla Deewana 2
desc: Dharam and Gajodhar, a father-son duo, pose as owners of a huge company to con a business tycoon, but things spiral when Gajodhar's brother joins the scheme.

title: Pure Bollywood
desc: Bollywood songs - catchy, emotional, and upbeat - dominate the charts. From heartbreak to celebration, these tracks capture every mood, making people dance, cry, and sing along everywhere.

title: Sankat City
desc: Guru is an automobile thief and Ganpat his partner. They steals a Mercedes belonging to Faujdar, a criminal don who loans people big money.

title: Vishwaroopam
desc: Nirupama, an ambitious student in the USA, marries dance master Viswanathan. Suspecting his behaviour, she hires a detective who uncovers his real identity and hidden past.

title: Rehnaa Hai Terre Dil Mein
desc: Maddy impersonates Rajeev, the man Reena is set to marry, in an attempt to win her love - but he's unprepared for the chaos that follows when the truth comes out.

title: Maine Pyar Kiya
desc: Prem and Suman's love story faces a tough test when family feuds drive them apart. Can Prem overcome the obstacles and prove he's deserving of Suman's heart?

title: Gadar-Ek Prem Katha
desc: During the partition, Tara marries Sakina, living happily together. Their joy ends when Sakina's father forces her to remain in Pakistan, separating her from Tara and her family forever.

title: Gadar 2
desc: Tara Singh goes missing during a skirmish and is believed captured in Pakistan. His son Jeete sets out to rescue him, plunging them into a deadly maze they must escape at all costs.

title: Sooryavanshi
desc: With Mumbai under threat of a major terrorist attack, ATS chief Sooryavanshi launches a high-stakes mission to track down 600 kg of missing RDX and the masterminds behind the plot.

title: Baa Baaa Black Sheep
desc: Baba's 25th birthday shocks him as he comes to know that he has to take over his 12 generations old family business of assassination. He falls in love with Angelina, who has secrets of her own.
